title: Bibhutibhushan Wildlife Sanctuary
tagline: Bibhutibhushan Wildlife Sanctuary — wildlife reserve of West Bengal

overview.short: Bibhutibhusan Wildlife Sanctuary (formerly Parmadan Forest) is an animal sanctuary in North 24 Parganas district in the Indian state of West Bengal.
overview.description: Bibhutibhusan Wildlife Sanctuary (formerly Parmadan Forest) is an animal sanctuary in North 24 Parganas district in the Indian state of West Bengal. The forest is located about 100 km from Kolkata and 25 km from Bongaon. Situated on the banks of the Ichamati River covering an area of 0.68 km2 it has more than 200 deer, birds, rabbit and many langurs. It also has a children's park, a small zoo and a tourist lodge of the forest department.

topPlaces.name: Naldugari
topPlaces.description: Naldugari is a village in Bagdah block in Bangaon subdivision of North 24 Parganas district in the Indian state of West Bengal.

topPlaces.name: Kazirber Union
topPlaces.description: Kazirber Union (Bengali: কাজীরবেড় ইউনিয়ন) is a union parishad of Maheshpur Upazila, in Jhenaidah District, Khulna Division of Bangladesh. The union has an area of 91.87 square kilometres (35.47 sq mi) and as of 2001 had a population of 25,136.

topPlaces.name: Duttapulia
topPlaces.description: Dattapulia is a village in the Ranaghat II CD block in the Ranaghat subdivision of the Nadia district, West Bengal, India.

items.note: Naldugari is a village in Bagdah block in Bangaon subdivision of North 24 Parganas district in the Indian state of West Bengal.

Kazirber Union (Bengali: কাজীরবেড় ইউনিয়ন) is a union parishad of Maheshpur Upazila, in Jhenaidah District, Khulna Division of Bangladesh. The union has an area of 91.87 square kilometres (35.47 sq mi) and as of 2001 had a population of 25,136.
Dattapulia is a village in the Ranaghat II CD block in the Ranaghat subdivision of the Nadia district, West Bengal, India.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Bibhutibhushan Wildlife Sanctuary?
faq.a: The best time to visit Bibhutibhushan Wildlife Sanctuary is Oct – Mar. Summers are 26–40°C and winters are 12–28°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Bibhutibhushan Wildlife Sanctuary?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Netaji Subhas Chandra Bose International Airport, Kolkata (67 km) and the nearest railway station is Howrah Junction (Kolkata) (80 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Bibhutibhushan Wildlife Sanctuary?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Bibhutibhushan Wildlife Sanctuary at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Bibhutibhushan Wildlife Sanctuary?
faq.a: Stays in Bibhutibhushan Wildlife Sanctuary start from ₹2,500 per night, with options across 5 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Bibhutibhushan Wildlife Sanctuary?
faq.a: The top attractions are Naldugari, Kazirber Union, Duttapulia.
